testcase.name: testApplyLeaveWorkflow

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //div[@role='option'][contains(., 'CAN - Personal Leave')] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[@role='option'][contains(., 'CAN - Personal Leave')]"}.
